label: tight
observation: The chinstrap is visibly pulled snug under the chin with no visible gap between strap and skin.

label: loose
observation: The strap hangs below the chin with a visible gap; no contact between strap and skin.

label: tight
observation: Strap is firmly secured against the jaw with no play or slack visible.

label: loose
observation: The chinstrap is unbuckled and dangling to one side of the helmet.

label: tight
observation: Buckle is fastened and strap contours the chin closely with visible tension.
